name: VectorMap
description: An SVG-based interactive vector map component for displaying geographic data. Supports hover tooltips, click handlers, and customizable layer styling.
usage_guidelines: Use for displaying geographic/regional data visualizations.
Provide layers array with SVG path data for each region.
Use layerProps function to customize individual layer styling.
Add hover tooltips via layerProps hover.tooltipContent.
Handle region clicks via layerProps onClick callback.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SVG map element.

name.description: Accessible name for the map (used in aria-label).

viewBox.description: SVG viewBox attribute defining the coordinate system.

layers.description: Array of layer objects with id, name, and d (SVG path data).

layerProps.description: Function returning props for each layer including className, onClick, and hover config.

children.description: Additional SVG elements to render inside the map.

styling_info.visual_description: SVG map with path elements for each region. Default fill is gray-300 (gray-600 dark mode). Hover tooltips appear as dark floating cards near cursor.

Basic.title: Basic

WithTooltip.title: With Tooltip
